# CWE-1289 positive: path equivalence bypass (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1289-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1289: Improper Validation of Unsafe Equivalence in Input.
// Vulnerable: resource id compared literally without filepath.Clean normalization.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func FetchSharedAssetPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	root := "/srv/assets/public"
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		requested := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
		if requested == "private/keys.pem" {
			http.Error(w, "blocked", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		full := filepath.Join(root, requested)
		data, err := os.ReadFile(full)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Write(data)
	}
}
